final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 creator post featuring 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" 小红书 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9-grid (九宫格) layout arranged as a single vertical cover image
Subject: must include 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, prominently visible
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, everyday 素人 creator atmosphere — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a natural, approachable everyday feel — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful 小红书-style direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered, primary title) in a cute and differentiated font style
Constraints: must preserve 9-grid panel structure visible as a unified vertical cover; 大疆 Pocket 4 product must be clearly recognizable
Avoid: overly polished commercial photography look; avoid studio-brand aesthetic
